relations.note: Both govern the same 'YOU DESERVE MORE' campaign headline element and apply together whenever the headline is rendered.
The verbatim lockup copy extends the same headline element governed by the typography/layout rule.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Lock the approved typographic treatment and hero stacking for the campaign headline lockup.
rules.rule_text: The 'YOU DESERVE MORE' campaign headline is set in Agenda (digital live text only for this headline; email fallback uses the Nunito Sans stack, 'Nunito Sans', Verdana, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif), always in ALL CAPS (campaign_headline.case), and left-aligned (campaign_headline.alignment = left). In hero placements it stacks as three lines: YOU / DESERVE / MORE.

quotes: Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue**
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Preserve the deliberate disease-name letter-tint device and restrict headline color to the two approved brand colorways.
rules.rule_text: In the campaign headline, the letters 'D' (in DESERVE) and 'M' (in MORE) are tinted to approximately 40% of the headline color (campaign_headline.color, default Gold/Sunshine #ffc60a, or the approved Brand Blue #00529b alternate) — a symbolic nod to the 'd' and 'm' of dermatomyositis. Only these two approved colorways may be used, each with the same 40% letter-tint treatment applied consistently.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: **YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Preserve the exact approved claim wording tied to the campaign headline lockup.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup copy — 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.' — must be reproduced verbatim wherever the full lockup is used, since it carries an approved product claim.
